english_query: how to decide when the right thing to do is not clear

Person number one: That sounds hard. What if two choices both make many people happy but in different ways?

Person number two: Then you must look at the kind of person you want to be. You must look at the things you believe are always right. You must ask if your choice follows those things.

english_query: why people sometimes pick the worse thing even when they know better
ugf_response:
When a person sees two ways to act, one that will bring more good later and one that looks easier now, they sometimes still go for the easier way even though they know the other way is better. This can happen in small things like choosing a small piece of food, or in big things like choosing a job or a person they live with. The person may feel a pull toward the easy thing and then move in that direction.  

The hard question is why a mind that knows the better way can still pick the worse way. What makes the pull of the now so strong that it can beat the thought of later good? This question has no simple yes or no, and many people have tried to talk about it.  

One answer that people give is that the feeling of now feels safe and not making you feel afraid. The brain can think that a change may bring pain or the thing that is taken away, so it stays with what it knows. Another answer is that the person may want a quick good feeling now and not wait for a bigger good later. The quick good feeling can be a sweet feeling in the mouth, a laugh, a look, or a feeling of being okay for a short time. A third answer is that past hurt can make a person trust the easy thing more than the new thing, because the new thing may have caused hurt before. Another answer is that the person may not see the later good clearly; the picture of the later good can be not clear, and the brain may pick the thing it can see right now.  

One more view is that the draw of feeling can be strong enough that the mind does not use the clear thought about later good. The mind may be busy with many other things, and the draw of now can win. This is why we see people sometimes pick the worse thing even when they know better.

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response:
Imagine a group of people living together in a place. To live well, they must decide how to act toward one another. They need to make a set of ways to act that everyone will follow. One way to make these ways is to say that we should only do things that every person could say yes to if they were thinking clearly and being even. This means that if we make a way for people to act, we must ask if any person, in any place, could say yes to it.

The hard question is this. How do we know which ways of acting are good enough for everyone? If we want to make a way for all people to follow, we cannot just pick what one group wants. We must find a way that stays the same for every person, no matter who they are or where they live. We must ask if a way of acting would be okay for a person who has nothing, or for a person who has everything.

Some people say we must look at what happens after we act. They think a way of acting is good if it makes the most feeling of good for the most people. They say that if a way of acting makes many people feel good and only a few people feel bad, then it is a good way. They think this is the best way to make life good for the whole group.

Other people say that is not enough. They say that some things are always wrong, even if they make many people feel good. They think that we must follow ways of acting that hold every single person in high thought. They say that we cannot use one person to make others feel good. To them, a way of acting is only good if it acts toward every person as a person who can choose for themselves. They think we should only follow ways that we would want everyone else to follow too.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
The first idea is that a person can do things that are right many times. The second idea is that doing these right things again and again changes who that person is. The person says that if you do what is right many times, you will become a person who is good.

The thing that follows from these ideas is that how a person acts in the world tells us what kind of person they are deep inside. If a person always acts in a way that helps others, we can say that they are a good person. We see the way they are good by the things they do.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. One way to look at it is to say that it is a good way to think. If we do things in a right way, it can change how we think and how we feel. Doing a right thing can make it easier to do that same right thing again. In this way, the things we do and who we are become the same thing.

However, there is another way to look at it. A person might do a right thing only because they want something else, or because they are afraid. In those cases, the person is not doing the thing because they are good, but because they want to get something. If we only look at what a person does, we might think they are good when they are actually thinking about themselves. So, the thinking might not be very good if it does not look at why the person is doing the thing.

english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know something. If every person tries to do what is best for them, why does that make life bad for everyone else?

Person number two: It happens because what is good for one person can take things away from other people. If many people all want the same thing at the same time, there will not be enough for everyone.

If every person wants to take as much water as they can to make their own garden grow, the water will go away. Soon, there is no water left for anyone. Each person thought they were doing the right thing for their own garden, but they made the whole place dry.

Person number one: So, if I think only about my own needs, I might hurt the group without meaning to?

Person number two: Yes. That is the problem. When people only look at what they want, they do not see how the things they do touch the things that everyone needs to live well. If everyone acts this way, the things that keep us all safe and happy will break.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know why we cannot know what will happen next by looking at what has happened before.

Person number one: So you are saying that even if we see things happening in a way that repeats, that way could stop at any time?

Person number two: Yes. A new thing could come in and change everything. The things that happened before do not have power over the things that have not happened yet.

Person number one: That makes me feel like I can never really know anything for sure.

Person number two: You can know many things, but you must remember that knowing what was is not the same as knowing what will be.

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Most people feel things in a way that is not even. If you find ten pieces of gold on the ground, you will feel good. If you lose ten pieces of gold from your pocket, you will feel very bad. But the way you feel is not the same. The bad feeling from losing the gold is much bigger than the good feeling from finding it. This is a thing that happens to many people in many ways.

To understand this, we must look at how our minds work. We want to stay safe. In the old days, when people lived in the wild, losing something important like food or a home could mean death. Finding extra food was good, but losing the food you already had was much more bad. Our minds grew to pay more attention to things that could hurt us. This helps us stay alive.

We can see this by looking at how people make choices. Imagine two paths. On the first path, you might win some good things. On the second path, you might lose some good things. Most people will choose to stay where they are if the chance of losing is there, even if the chance of winning is the same size. The fear of the thing being gone is a heavy weight that pulls harder than the hope of the win.

Think about it this way. If you have a box of ten eggs and you drop it, you feel a great pain in your heart. If someone gives you a box of ten eggs, you feel good, but the good feeling is not as strong as the pain you felt when you broke your own eggs. The thing being gone feels like it takes something away from who you are. The win feels like it is just something extra. Because of this, we often act in ways that keep us from losing, even when those ways stop us from getting much more.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response:
The person starts with the first idea. This idea says that finding the very best answer to a thing takes a long time and a lot of work. They say that as you look closer and closer to find the best answer, you spend more and more time and more and more of the power your body and mind have. The second idea is that there is a point where the extra work you do does not give you much more help. If you spend ten hours to get an answer that is ten times better than a one hour answer, you might be using up your life for nothing. The third idea is that if you stop when the answer is good enough, you can use that extra time to do other things that help.

The person thinks that because of these ideas, it is often better to pick a good enough answer instead of the best one. They think that if you want to use your time and your power in a way that shows you know how to live well, you should stop looking for the best answer once you have one that works well. They believe that the time you save can be used to do many other things that are good.

Now we must look at if the thinking is good. The thinking is good in many ways. It is true that time and power are things we do not have in large numbers. If we spend all our time on one thing to make it perfect, we will never do anything else. This is a very good way to look at life. However, there is a way the thinking could be bad. If the thing you are doing is very important, like keeping people safe, then a good enough answer might not be enough. In some cases, you must find the very best answer or people will get hurt. So, the thinking is good most of the time, but it rests on what kind of thing you are working on.

ugf_response:

english_query: what it means to really know a thing and not just believe it
ugf_response:
To understand how to tell the way one thing is not like the way another thing is when you think something is true and when you really know it, we must look at three different parts. Imagine you have a thought in your head about how the world works. This thought might be a guess or something you feel is true. But a thought in your head is not the same as knowing.

The first part is that the thing must be true. If you think the sun will come up tomorrow, but it does not, then you did not know it. You were wrong. You cannot know something that is not true. To know something, it must be a real thing that stays the same for everyone.

The second part is that you must believe it. If you say you know that a certain man takes things that do not belong to him, but in your heart you do not think he does this, then you do not know it. You cannot say you know a thing if you do not think it is true. You must hold the thought in your mind as something real.

The third part is the most important. This is what makes a thought different from a lucky guess. To know for sure, you must have a good reason for your thought. Imagine a man who guesses how many small round food things are in a glass box. He says there are one hundred small round food things. He is right, but he did not know it. He just guessed. He had no way to show why he was right. To know, you must be able to show why your thought is true. You must see the things that make it true. You must have a way to show that your thought is not just a lucky guess.

So, to know a thing, three things must happen at the same time. First, the thing must be true in the real world. Second, you must believe it is true. Third, you must have a very good reason that shows why it is true. If you only have one or two of these, you do not have the state of knowing. You only have a thought or a guess. When you have all three, you can say you know.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
Imagine you have two things. The first thing is a piece of information that you know is true. The second thing is a new piece of information that you want to know is also true. You want to know if the second thing must be true because the first thing is true. This is a way of seeing if the first thing leads to the second thing in a way that cannot be wrong.

The hard question is how we can be sure that the second thing follows from the first. How do we know that we are not just doing something wrong in our heads? How do we know that the path from the first thing to the second thing is a real path and not just something we want to see?

Some people say that we can find the answer by looking at the way things work in the world. They look at what happens and see if the way things move stays the same. If they see that every time the first thing happens, the second thing also happens, they think it is a good sign. They believe that the world shows us the truth if we watch it well. But some say this is not enough, because even if it happened many times before, it might not happen next time.

Other people say that we should only look at the way the thoughts are built. They do not care about the world outside. They only care if the steps in the thinking are the way they should be. They say that if you start with something true and you follow the steps of thought without doing something wrong, then the end must be true. They think the truth is found in the way the pieces of thought fit together, like pieces of a wood house.

There are also people who say that we can never be very sure. They say that our minds can play games on us. They think that we might see a path where there is no path. They say that we can only say that something is probably true, but we can never say it is the only thing that can be true. They believe that there is always a small chance that we are wrong.

english_query: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
ugf_response: First, we look at a time when two people agree to do something for each other. One person gives a thing and the other person gives money or work. This is a promise. The hard question is why some of these promises last for a long time and why others break very quickly. We must think about what holds the people together. One answer is that both people trust each other. If they believe the other person will do their part, they feel safe. They do not worry about being hurt or losing what they have. This trust makes the promise strong. Another answer is that there is a way to make someone pay if they do not do their part. If a person knows they will be in trouble if they break the promise, they will try to keep it. This fear of trouble can hold the promise together. But sometimes, people do not trust each other. They think the other person might take the good part and leave them with nothing. If this feeling is strong, the promise breaks before it even starts. Also, if the thing they are giving to one another changes in how good it is, the promise might break. If one person feels they are getting less than they should, they may stop doing their part. This shows that promises need trust or strong ways to keep people doing what they said to stay together. Without these things, the promise is not strong and can break when things get hard.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
First, when you want to do something that has another person in it, you should take a moment to think about what that other person might want or need. Think about what they feel now, what they have wanted in the past, and what they have done before in times like this. Then ask yourself a simple question: what might they do because of those wants and feelings? You can make a guess about what they will do next. 

When you have a guess, look at the plan you have for yourself. See if your plan would fit with the guess you have made. If your plan would make the other person feel bad or would make them do something that stops you from getting the thing you want, you may want to change your plan. You can try a different plan that works better with what you think they will do. You can also have a back up plan that can work even if the other person does something you did not think of. That back up is a way to keep you safe. 

It also helps to watch the other person as they do things. Their things give you signs that tell you if your guess was right. If they do something you did not think of, you can change your guess and then change your own plan to fit the new sign. 

In short, before you act, think about what the other person wants, what they have done before, and how they might feel. Use that to make a guess about what they will do. Then fit your own move to that guess, and stay ready to change if you see new signs. This way you are more possible to act in a way that works for both you and the other person.

ugf_response:

english_query: the difference between knowing for sure and having a good reason to think so
ugf_response: First, we must look at the first thing, which is the state of being sure about a thing. To know a thing for sure means that the thing must be true and there can be no way for it to be not true. This state needs that we have seen the thing with our own eyes or that there is no way for the thing to be anything else. Second, we look at the second thing, which is having a strong reason to believe something. This is when we see many things that point to one way of thinking. For one way to see this, if we see dark clouds and feel the wind, we might think rain is coming. We do not know for sure that rain will fall, because the wind could stop and the clouds could go away. However, the things we see give us a very good reason to think rain will happen. Third, we see how these two things are not the same. The first thing is about what is true in all ways and at all times. The second thing is about what will most often happen resting on what we see now. The way they are not the same is that the second thing can be wrong even if the reasons were good, but the first thing cannot be wrong because it is the truth. Finally, we can say that the first thing is a state of being that cannot change, while the second thing is a way of thinking that helps us move through the world even when we do not see everything.

english_query: the question of whether animals feeling pain matters as much as people
ugf_response:
Many people ask if the hurt that a dog or a large thing that gives white drink feels is the same as the hurt a person feels. This is a big question about how we should act toward living things. To think about this, we must look at what it means to feel bad or to feel hurt.

First, we look at the way things feel. When a person is hurt, their body sends a sign to their head. This sign says, "This is bad! Stop this!" Most living things also have this sign. When a living thing is hurt, it cries out or tries to run away. This shows that the living thing is feeling something bad. Because they both feel bad, some people say that their hurt is the same. They say that if it is bad for a person to be hurt, it must also be bad for a living thing to be hurt.

Second, we look at how much a living thing can think. Some people think that people are more important because we can think about the time before now and what might happen after now. We can think about what happened the day before this one and what might happen when the sun comes up again. We can think about the meaning of our lives. They say that because a living thing might not think this way, the hurt of the living thing does not matter as much. They think that the power to think about the world makes the life of a person have more good.

Third, we look at how we act toward others. If we say that only people matter, then we might do things to living things that are very bad. We might act toward them like things instead of living things that are alive. But if we say that all things that feel hurt matter, then we must be more careful. We must think about how what we do will make other living things feel.

There are two main ways to look at this. One way is to say that only people have the special kind of mind that makes them important. The other way is to say that the power to feel hurt is what matters most. If you can feel bad, you are a thing that matters. This way of thinking says that we should try not to cause hurt to any living thing that can feel it.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to find the best answer to a problem. The best answer is the one that is the most right and has no wrong parts. However, finding this best answer often takes a very long time and uses a lot of things like money or work. Second, we must think about an answer that is good enough. An answer that is good enough is one that is good and makes the problem go away well, even if it is not the most perfect. Third, we see that time is a thing that is always moving. The thing after the third thing, we look at the things we use to find answers, such as our power or our money. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we can see that an answer that is good enough can be found quickly. This lets us move on to the next thing to do. english_query: what it means for a case to be put together well
ugf_response:
When you want to show that something is true, you must bring together many small pieces of what you know. To do this well, you must follow a few steps.

First, you must have a clear idea of what you want to show. You must know exactly what you are trying to say is true. If you do not know what you want to show, you will get lost.

Second, you must find pieces of what you know that help your idea. These pieces could be things people saw, things people said, or things that happened in the past. Each piece must be a good piece. A good piece is something that is true and something that people can see or feel. If a piece is not true, your whole thing will fall down.

Third, you must put these pieces together in a way that makes sense. You cannot just throw them in a pile. You must show how one piece leads to the next piece. You must show how the pieces work together to make your main idea look strong. It is like building a house. You do not just put wood and stone in a pile. You must put them in a way that makes a strong wall.

The step after the third step is to look for the things that might make your idea look wrong. You must look at the pieces that do not fit. You must think about what a person who does not believe you would say. If you can answer their questions and show why they are wrong, your idea becomes even stronger.

Finally, a thing is put together well if all the pieces fit and they lead to the one thing you wanted to show. If you follow these steps, people will believe you because your story is strong and your pieces are true.

english_query: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
ugf_response:
We can see a scene where a group of people work together in a place that has many written laws and many spoken directions. The other people watch this and feel that something is missing. They feel that the first person is not being kind or just even though the first person does not break any law or any written thing.  

The hard question here is why it is not enough to just do all the things that are told by a law or a written thing if a person does not think about the other people. Some people say that the only thing we need to do is follow the law, because the law is made to keep us safe and to keep things just. They think that if we all do what the law says, then the world will work well. They may say that caring for other people is a feeling that can be different for each person, and that feeling should not be a part of a law.  

Other people say that caring for other people is the most important part of any good thing done. They point out that a law can be made by people who do not see every small need of every other person. They say that if we follow a written thing but do not think about the hurt or the happy feeling of the people around us, then what happens can be a place that feels cold or not just. They may give a story of a time when a written thing about a line in a shop made a child wait a long time, and the worker who followed the written thing did not help the child, so the child felt sad. In that story the written thing was kept, but the feeling of the child was not cared for, and many think that the worker should have done more than just the written thing.  

A third view joins the two. It says that written things are a good start, a ground that keeps us from doing bad things, but that we also need to add a thought about the people we meet. It suggests that a good thing done is like a two part thing: first we check the law, then we ask we can make the other person feel better or at least not hurt. This view says that the question is not about throwing away the written things, but about adding a caring step after the written thing.  

Why do people give these different thoughts? Some may have grown up in a place where the law was very hard, so they trust the law a lot. Others may have seen many times that the law did not help a friend, so they trust the feeling of care more. Some may think that a world where only the law matters is safe, while others think that a world where we also care for each other is a world where people feel safe inside, not just outside.  

In the end, the scene shows that just following a law or a written thing without caring for the people around can leave a hole. The big question stays: can a set of written things be enough for a good life, or do we always need to add a thought about how other people feel? The different answers come from how each person has seen the world and what they think is most needed for a place where people can live together.

english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response:
A person can look at the picture in their mind of who the person inside is. They may think that they are quiet, not loud, because they have done those things for a long time. One day they start to do new things – they speak up in a group, they help a stranger, they try a game they never tried before. As they keep doing these new things, the way they see the person inside can change. The picture in their mind of what they are can grow bigger or turn to a different shape.

The hard question that comes up is whether a person really becomes a different person when they change what they do, or whether they are only adding new parts to the same old person inside. One side of the question asks if the inside – the feelings, the thoughts, the sense of who they are – follows the outside things they do. The other side asks if the inside can stay the same even while the outside changes a lot. A third view says that the inside and the outside are tied together, so a change in one will always pull the other along, but not always in the same how much.

Many people say that the answer is yes, that who we are is mostly what we do. They point to the fact that when we act in a new way we learn new things they can do well, meet new people, and feel new feelings, and those new pieces become part of the picture of the person inside. They think that the more we do a certain way the more that way becomes part of who we are.

Other people say that the answer is no, that a deep part of the inside can stay the same even if we try many new things. They talk about a deep feeling of “I am still me” that does not move just because we pick up a new thing for fun or speak in a new voice. For them, the inside is like a quiet river that can move like water under many different stones without being changed by the stones.

A third group says that both ideas have truth. They say that some parts of the inside can change with new things they do, especially the parts that are about how we see the world and what we think we can do. At the same time, they say there are parts that stay the same, like a simple wish to be kind or a simple need to feel safe. The way what changes and what stays are put together can be different for each person, which is why the question is hard and why many answers can be given.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
Many people think that if a great many people say something is true, then it must be true. They believe that if most people in a room say the sky is green, then the sky is green. This way of thinking feels safe. It feels like if you go with the big group, you will be right and you will not be alone. This is a way to find what is true by looking at what everyone else thinks.

But there is a big problem with this way of thinking. The hard question is this: can a big group of people be wrong about something? We know that they can. In the past, many people believed that the earth was the center of everything and that nothing moved around it. They were a big group, but they were wrong. If we only believe what the big group says, we might never find the true way things are. We might stay stuck in a wrong way of thinking just because it is what everyone else says.

Some people say we should always look at what the big group says. They think this is a good way to live because it keeps things the same and keeps people together. They say that if we do not follow the group, we will do many things that are not right which the group has already seen and fixed. To them, the group is like a large eye that sees more than one person can see.

Other people say we must not trust the big group too much. They think we must look at the things themselves to see if they are true. They say that truth does not care how many people believe it. If one person sees a thing that is true, and a number of people so large it is hard to count say it is not true, the one person is still right. These people believe we must use our own eyes and our own minds to find what is real, even if it makes us stand alone. They think that if we only follow the crowd, we will never learn anything new or find a better way to live.

english_query: why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing
ugf_response:
The person is talking about a way of thinking. The first idea is that a person can have a thought that is true. This person thinks something is true, and it is actually true in the real world. The second idea is that the person has this true thought for bad reasons. This means the way they got to that thought was not good or was not right. The third idea is that having a true thought for bad reasons is not the same as having the state of being sure that something is true and having a good way to show it.

The person thinks that if you have a true thought because of a bad reason, you do not have the state of being sure that something is true and having a good way to show it. They think that to have that state, you must have a good reason that makes the thought true. If the reason is bad, then even if the thought is true, you do not really have that state.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. The thinking is good because it shows that truth and the way we get to truth are two different things. If we only look at whether a thought is true, we might think a person is good at finding the truth when they were just lucky. If a person makes a guess that happens to be right, they were not using a good way to find the truth. Because of this, the person who says that being sure must have more than just being right is using a good way to think. They are saying that being sure must have a strong and good way of being found.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
The person is talking about a way of thinking that leads to a bad choice. The first idea is that a person has already given away a lot of money or time to something. The second idea is that they feel they must keep giving more because they have already given so much. They think that if they stop now, the things they already gave will have been for nothing.

The thing they think follows from this is that they should keep going. They believe that adding more money or more time will make the first part of their work or spending good again. They think that more spending will turn a bad start into a good thing.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. This way of thinking is not good. It is a way that is not right in how a person thinks. The things you did in the past are gone. You cannot get them back. When you decide what to do next, you should only look at what will happen from now on. You should not look at what you did before. If you spend more just because you spent a lot before, you are only making the thing you do not have even bigger. You are not making the first part of the spending have any use. This is a bad way to make a choice.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
Person 1: Why does doing good things many times change who we are?  
Person 2: When you do a good thing, you feel a small warm feeling inside. If you do that many times, that feeling grows.  
Person 1: Is that feeling what makes us a good person?  
Person 2: Yes. The more you act with care for others, the more your mind and feelings learn to act that way.  
Person 1: So it is like a way that you do many times that builds a new kind of the person you are?  
Person 2: Exactly. Each good act is a step that adds to the way you act as a person.  
Person 1: Can someone stop being a good person if they stop doing good things?  
Person 2: If they stop, the warm feeling may fade, and the way they act may change back toward the old.  
Person 1: So we need to keep doing good things to stay good?  
Person 2: Right. Keep the act of doing it many times, and the good you will stay strong.

english_query: the problem of everyone using up something that belongs to all
ugf_response:
The first idea is that some things belong to everyone and no one person. These things are things that all people can use and no one person can own alone. The second idea is that every person wants to use these things to make their own life better. The third idea is that when many people use a thing at the same time, they take more than what is right for them. The idea after the third idea is that because no one owns the thing, no one feels they must take care of it or stop others from using it too much.

The person thinks that because of these ideas, a bad thing will happen. They think that if everyone acts in their own way to get what they want, the thing that belongs to everyone will be used up or broken. They think that what is good for one person is bad for the whole group of people. They think that this will lead to a place where the thing is gone and no one can use it anymore.

We must look at if the thinking is good. The first part is true. It is true that some things belong to everyone and that people often use them in ways that make them go away. The second part is also true. It is true that if people only think about themselves, they will use things up too fast. However, the thinking might not be good if it says that people cannot find a way to work together. The thinking holds the thought that people cannot make a new way of living where they take care of things together. It also holds the thought that people cannot make new ways to stop the thing from going away. So, the thinking is true about the problem, but it might not be the only way things can go.

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response:
The first idea is that every person is tied to other people in some way. This means that no one lives in a way that has nothing to do with anyone else. The second idea is that because of this tie, people must help one another to live well.

The thing that follows from these two ideas is that we have a thing we must do to look after each other. If we are all tied together, then what happens to one person will touch the others. Because of this, we should act in ways that make things good for the whole group instead of just for the people who are just the one person.

When we look at if this way of thinking is good, we see some good parts and some bad parts. On one hand, it is true that we need other people for food, for clothes, and for the things we learn. We cannot live alone. On the other hand, it is hard to know where this thing we must do ends. If we are all tied to everyone, do we have to help every person on the earth? Does a person have more of the thing they must do for their own family than for a stranger far away? It is hard to find the right way to use this idea without it becoming too much for one person to do.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who sees someone in need. This person has a set of things they must do. These things are written down by others. These written things tell the person how to act in every way. But then, the person sees a thing that makes them feel a great need to help. The written things say do not do this. The feeling inside says do help.

The hard question is this. Should a person do what is written, or should a person do what is right in their heart? Is it better to follow the written things, or is it better to be a good person?

Some people say we must follow the written things. They say that if we do not follow them, there will be no order. If everyone chose what they wanted to do instead of what was written, the world would be a bad place. They think the written things keep us safe and make sure everyone knows what to do. To them, the written things are the most important thing.

Other people say that being a good person is more important. They say that the written things can be wrong. They say that a person who only follows written things but does not think about what is good is not a person who is good in a real way. They think that what is inside a person, their heart and their mind, tells them how to act when the written things do not fit the moment. They think that doing what is right for the person in front of you is the most important thing.

This is a hard way to think. It asks us to look at the things we are told to do and the things we feel we must do. It asks if we are just people who follow words, or if we are people who know how to be good.

english_query: why what happens after you act matters for whether it was right
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means for a thing to be good or bad. Many people think that being good means doing the right thing at the moment you do it. They think that if your heart is good and you try to do good, then you are a good person. But we must also look at what comes after your act. If you do a thing that you think is good, but it leads to much hurt for many people, we must ask if that thing was real good. We cannot keep the act and the things that follow it away from each other. If we want to know if an act was right, we must look at the world after the act is done. We see if the world is better or if the world is worse. If we only look at what we thought at the start, we are not seeing the whole truth. The truth of an act is found in the way it changes things. Because of this, what happens after you act is a part of the act itself. If the end of your act is bad, then the act cannot be called good. This is because the whole point of doing things is to make the world a better place. If your act makes the world a bad place, then you have not done what is right.

english_query: the problem where two people could work together but might not
ugf_response:
Person 1: I have a question about why people do not work together when they could.

Person 2: That is a good question. It happens because each person thinks about what is best for them right now.

Person 1: But if they work together, do they not both get more?

Person 2: Yes, they do. If they both help each other, they both win. But if one helps and the other does not, the one who helps loses.

Person 1: So they are scared of losing?

Person 2: Exactly. They are afraid the other person will not help. So they choose not to help either.

Person 1: That means they both get less than they could have.

Person 2: Yes. They miss out on the good thing because they do not trust each other.

Person 1: How do they fix that?

Person 2: They need to talk and promise to do the right thing. Then they can trust and win together.

english_query: the idea that the right thing to do is what leads to the most good
ugf_response:
When we think about what to do, we first look at the act itself. An act is something a person does. After an act, things can happen to other people. Some of those things make people feel happy, safe, or have what they need. We can call those things good. Other things can make people feel sad, hurt, or miss what they need. Those we call not good.  

To decide which act is the right one, we can count how many of the good things happen because of the act. If one act makes many people feel happy, safe, or have food, and another act only makes a few people feel that way, the first act makes more good. The idea we are talking about says that the right act is the one that makes the most good for the most people.  

First, we look at one act we think about. Then we think about what will happen after the act. We ask: will this act cause many good things or only a few? We also ask: will it cause any not good things? If the act brings a lot of good and little or no not good, it is the right choice. If another act brings less good or more not good, it is not the right choice.  

In short, the way to know what the right thing to do is to imagine what will happen later after each act we think about and see which later time has the most good. The act that leads to that later time is the one we should pick. This way we try to help as many people as we can and make the world a place where more people feel happy and safe.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to be a person. Each person is a thing that can feel pain and feel good things. We can see that when we hurt a person, they feel bad in their body and in their mind. Second, we must think about how we want other people to act toward us. Most people do not want to be hurt or made to feel small. Third, we look at the idea of a way to live that works for everyone. If we say it is okay to hurt people to get what we want, then anyone could hurt you to get what they want. This would make the world a place of fear where no one is safe. The thing after the third step is that we see that if we want a world where we can live together, we must have ways to act that do not hurt the others. If we do not have these ways, the whole group will fall to pieces. The thing after the thing after the third step is that we find that some things are so bad that they break the way people stay together. If you do these things, you are saying that other people do not matter. This is not a good way to live because it makes life something that cannot be. Because of this, we must not do these things so that we can all live in a way that is not fighting and stay safe.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
The first thing the person says is that a good life comes from being a good person. This is the part they say is true. They are saying that if you do things that are right and good, your life will have a good way of being.

The second thing is what they think follows from that first thing. They think that if you act in a way that is good, then the state of your life will be good. They see a path between how you act and how your life feels or how it is seen by others.

The third thing is to look at if the way they think is good. This is to see if the first thing leads to the second thing in a way that makes sense. One might ask if a person can be good but still have a life that is not good. One might also ask if a person can have a life that is good but not be a good person. Because of this, the way they think may not be as strong as it looks. It is not clear if being good is the only thing that makes a life good.

english_query: how a story about one person does not tell us about everyone
ugf_response:
When we hear a story about one person we may feel that we see a little bit of what many people are like. The story can show a time when that one person felt sad, or felt fear and still kept going, or had to work hard. It can also show how that one person met a problem and tried to fix it. When we hear that, our mind may jump to think that the same kind of feeling or thing they did might be true for a lot of other people. That jump is the hard question we have to think about.

The hard question is whether a story about one person can give us a good picture of what all people in a group think, feel, or do. Some people say that a single story can be a small sign of what many people are like. They point out that many people share the same kind of life, the same kind of need, and the same kind of chance to meet the same kind of problem. They think that if one person can show a way to act, then many others might act the same way because they live in the same world and have the same kind of chance to learn.

Other people say that a single story cannot tell us about the whole group. They say that each person is a one of a kind set of many parts put together – family, body state, place, and chance – and that a single story may only show a special case. They tell about hurt that we might think we know a lot about many people when we only know a little about one, and that this can lead us to think something that is not true about the rest. They also note that some groups have many ways they are not the same, and a story that fits one person may not fit another who lives in a different place or who has a different set of needs.

Why do the two sides think in another way? The first side often feels that the world has ways that repeat, and that a story can show a way that repeats. They may have seen many times that one kind of event leads to what happens for many. The second side often feels that the world also has many little changes that can change what happens, and that a single story can hide those changes. They may have seen times when a story seemed true for one person but was wrong for another, and they tell about hurt that using one story for all can hide those small but important changes.

In the end, the question stays open. We can take the story of one person and look for signs that might fit a larger group, but we also need to keep an eye on the many ways people can be not the same. We may need to ask more stories, ask more people, and keep checking if the signs still fit. In that way we can try to make a picture that is not only from one story, but from many small pieces that together make a better view of the whole.

english_query: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
ugf_response: First, we look at what a reason is. A reason is a cause for us to think something is true or to do something. Then we think about a good reason. A good reason is one that makes it very hard to say no. It is like a big rock that holds up a wall. If you have a good reason, most people will agree with you because the reason is clear and true. Next, we look at a bad reason. A bad reason is like a small stick from a tree. It does not hold much weight. If you have a bad reason, people can easily find a way to say it is not good enough. They might say the reason is not true or not important. This means the way a good reason is different from a bad reason is in how well the reason helps your idea. A good reason gives you a good chance of being right. A bad reason gives you a bad chance. Finally, we see that if we want to change the mind of another person, we need good reasons, not bad ones.

english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response:
Person 1: I heard you say that we can change who we are just by changing what we do. How does that work?

Person 2: It is simple. We are made of the things we do every day. If you do new things, you become a new person.

Person 1: But if I am a quiet person, how can doing loud things make me loud? It feels like I am just pretending.

Person 2: At first, it may feel like pretending. But if you keep doing it, your mind starts to think it is normal. You stop seeing it as a act and start seeing it as part of you.

Person 1: So the thing you do comes before the feeling? I always thought I had to feel like it before I could do it.

Person 2: No. The thing you do changes the feeling. If you smile, you start to feel happy. If you run, you start to feel strong. You do not need to wait for the feeling to arrive.

Person 1: That is a big idea. So if I want to be a writer, I just need to write every day?

Person 2: Yes. Do not wait to feel like a writer. Just write. Soon, you will look in the mirror and see a writer looking back.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response: First, we look at how our minds work. We all have some things we think are true before we see new things. These old thoughts are like a way we use to catch new facts. When we see something new, our mind uses this way to understand it. If the new thing fits the way, we think it is true. If it does not fit, we might ignore it or change it to fit. This is the hard part. We want to see the world as it really is. But our old thoughts make us see what we want to see. Some people say this is bad. They think we should try to forget our old thoughts. They say we must look at new things with fresh eyes. They believe this is the only way to find the truth. Other people say this is not possible. They say we cannot turn off our minds. They think it is better to know what we believe and watch for it. They say we should check if our old thoughts are right. They believe we can still learn if we are careful. Both sides want to know the truth. But they see the problem in different ways. One side wants to stop the mind from changing facts. The other side wants to use the mind better. This makes us think about how we learn. It shows that seeing is not just looking. It is also thinking with what we already know.
